entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan, a legume used for commercial hybrid cultivars

entities.name: CAJANUS CAJANIFOLIUS
entities.description: A wild relative of pigeonpea used in inter-specific hybridization

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC-NUCLEAR MALE-STERILITY
entities.description: A biological tool used by plant breeders to increase yields via hybrid vigour

entities.name: HYBRID VIGOUR
entities.description: The phenomenon of increased vigor in hybrid offspring used to increase yields

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area, measured in kg ha-1

entities.name: INTER-SPECIFIC HYBRIDIZATION
entities.description: The process of crossing two different species, such as Cajanus cajanifolius and Cajanus cajan

entities.name: ICP 2039A
entities.description: A stable cytoplasmic-nuclear male-sterility system derived from an inter-specific hybrid

entities.name: A4 CYTOPLASM
entities.description: The specific genetic material from the CMS system used to develop restorers and maintainers

entities.name: FERTILITY RESTORERS
entities.description: Lines developed to restore fertility in CMS hybrids

entities.name: MAINTAINERS
entities.description: Lines developed to maintain the CMS system

entities.name: ICPH 2470
entities.description: A short-duration experimental pigeonpea hybrid with high grain yield

entities.name: UPAS 120
entities.description: A control cultivar of pigeonpea used for comparison

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the hybrid breeding technology was adopted by the private seed sector

entities.name: HYBRID BREEDING
entities.description: The process of producing commercial hybrid cultivars
